hero.headline: Conquer Your Day, One Task at a Time
hero.subheadline: Taskr is the minimalist productivity app that turns your chaos into clarity, helping you focus on what matters most.

task_management.input_placeholder: What needs to get done today?

empty_state.title: Your productivity journey starts here
empty_state.description: No tasks yet — add one above and start crushing your goals!

validation_messages.empty_task: Oops! Task can't be empty. What do you need to do?

features.title: Minimalist Design
features.description: Zero clutter, maximum focus. Our clean interface helps you concentrate on completing tasks, not managing them.

features.title: Quick Task Entry
features.description: Capture thoughts instantly with our lightning-fast input. No more forgotten to-dos.

features.title: Smart Organization
features.description: Automatically prioritize and categorize tasks to keep you on track and productive.

images.name: hero_image
images.prompt: Modern, clean illustration of a diverse professional sitting at a minimalist desk, surrounded by floating, organized task cards. Soft indigo and cyan color palette, clean lines, digital art style showing focus and productivity.
